impact: This gives the daemon a narrow, reusable way to classify parser-clean failures into task, kind, compact summary, and retry hint while avoiding retention of full raw LLM responses.
summary: Add daemon-only parser-clean diagnostic helper and deterministic unittest coverage for repeated non-JSON LLM outputs.
target_task: Task checkbox-196: Add one daemon-only parser-clean diagnostic helper or unittest that converts repeated non-JSON LLM output into target_task, failure_kind, compact_raw_response_summary, and next_action_hint without storing the full raw response.

command: files=$(find ppd -name '*.ts' -not -path '*/node_modules/*' -print); test -z "$files" || npx tsc --noEmit --target ES2020 --module ESNext --moduleResolution node --strict --skipLibCheck --types node $files
